title: cyclosorus invisus
intro: Cyclosorus invisus, also known as Chinese cinnamon fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus invisus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Cyclosorus invisus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat ailments such as bronchitis, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
